programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Three gang members kidnap an officer; an armed robber is captured in a dollar store; a motorcycle officer is led on a high-speed chase through Florence, Ala.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A dramatic vehicle pursuit takes to the freeway; a suspect flees on foot wearing handcuffs; a man and his dog are found trapped by rapids.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Officers attempt to convince an armed man to drop his knife; animals escape during a DUI stop; a high-speed chase in Missoula, Mont., ends in a crash.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: In Fort Dodge, Iowa, an officer comes into unwanted contact with drug paraphernalia; in Saline, Mich., a DUI-suspect gets feisty; Maricopa County deputies apprehend a knife-wielding suspect.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Suspect assaults officer during arrest; high-speed chase through San Antonio; officers look for a missing toddler.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A man is arrested for claiming to be a police officer; an armed suspect leads Tulsa, Okla., police on a foot chase; a shootout in Troup County, Georgia.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A suspect leads police on a chase in Tennessee; police respond to a motel disturbance in North Carolina; a Georgia officer responds to a call of a choking baby.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A high-speed chase through the streets of Baltimore; a sovereign citizen flees police; a man wields a knife on the highway.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Florida deputies track a suspect with the help of Heli-cam and a K-9 unit; officers find a young toddler barely alive in a car wreck; a Texas man resists arrest.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Ohio authorities engage in a shootout with a suspect; Nevada Highway Patrol responds to a DUI accident; police help a woman with a special delivery.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A shoplifting suspect crashes an SUV in an attempt to elude police; intense standoff with a knife-wielding suspect; a Florida trooper's vehicle catches on fire during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A Texas man threatens to kill a police chief; a Florida burglar is caught on building roof; deputies and citizens work to save a man's life.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the vast outdoors with daylight fading fast.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a vehicle search, uncovering a laundry list of charges.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect makes it clear he's not stopping for anyone, it's up to K9 Murphy's speed and determination to bring the chase to an end; K9 Bear's bomb-detection training is suddenly put to the test when explosives detonate in the middle of the night; after eluding police for weeks, a naked fugitive is on the run again; K9 Eddie is called in, and the pursuit ends exactly as his training predicts; and K9 Red barrels into action after a suspect crashes into a police cruiser and then tears off.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Cisco responds to a break-in at the last place you'd ever expect - the Fraternal Order of Police Lodge while K9 Karma is deployed on a combative suspect who refuses to go quietly into the night. After his handler is struck by a vehicle, K9 Jakko continues on the pursuit alone, locking onto the trail of an armed suspect and when K9 Mickey makes the takedown, he pays a painful price in the process.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Richland County South Carolina officers smell marijuana coming from a car, which leads to a car and foot chase. An officer in Wilmington North Carolina responds to a disturbance call by showing off her football throwing skills.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Every search has a conclusion: whether it's finding a missing person or chasing a suspect on the run, a police K9 makes sure it ends with answers; K9 Pandora wastes no time bringing relief to a desperate family looking for a family member; K9s Jet and Cheney tag-team a fugitive who tears up the roadway and refuses to stop; K9 Karma shuts down a belligerent man fighting arrest; and K-9 Endo follows the scent straight to a dumpster.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect makes it clear he's not stopping for anyone, it's up to K9 Murphy's speed and determination to bring the chase to an end; K9 Bear's bomb-detection training is suddenly put to the test when explosives detonate in the middle of the night; after eluding police for weeks, a naked fugitive is on the run again; K9 Eddie is called in, and the pursuit ends exactly as his training predicts; and K9 Red barrels into action after a suspect crashes into a police cruiser and then tears off.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Cisco responds to a break-in at the last place you'd ever expect - the Fraternal Order of Police Lodge while K9 Karma is deployed on a combative suspect who refuses to go quietly into the night. After his handler is struck by a vehicle, K9 Jakko continues on the pursuit alone, locking onto the trail of an armed suspect and when K9 Mickey makes the takedown, he pays a painful price in the process.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Richland County South Carolina officers smell marijuana coming from a car, which leads to a car and foot chase. An officer in Wilmington North Carolina responds to a disturbance call by showing off her football throwing skills.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Every search has a conclusion: whether it's finding a missing person or chasing a suspect on the run, a police K9 makes sure it ends with answers; K9 Pandora wastes no time bringing relief to a desperate family looking for a family member; K9s Jet and Cheney tag-team a fugitive who tears up the roadway and refuses to stop; K9 Karma shuts down a belligerent man fighting arrest; and K-9 Endo follows the scent straight to a dumpster.

programme.title: Car accident? Free Legal Consultation
programme.desc: Legal professionals standing by to answer your questions.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The auction takes place in the old Chisholm Trail city of Fort Worth; Englishman David Kay returns and gets chippy with the competition.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: Moe's protegee, Mary Padian, gives new buyer Jenny Grumbles a run for her money; Ricky learns a lesson in human anatomy; Bubba seeks a buyer for his explicit art.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon seek hidden treasures in West Covina, Calif.; Ivy searches for low-level merchandise; Dave makes a first-class find.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene and Casey take on rival couple Jarrod and Brandi; Darrell wins an intriguing locker after dodging a bullet; Ivy encounters a furry friend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy tries to continue his winning streak; Rene and Darrell play mind games; Jarrod and Brandi visit a crime scene and travel back in time.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Riverside, Calif., Jarrod and Brandi have difficulty with too many choices and too much heat; Barry and Dave make an expensive wager on a couch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders battle in Garden Grove, Calif.; Dave raids King Tut's tomb; Darrell forms a new business "adventure" in Germany.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: On an uncharacteristically wet day in Montebello, King Darrell is on a mission to defend his throne; Rene and Casey signal their intentions to undermine his plans; Kenny gets bowled over by his locker; Lisa manages to rope herself something decent.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: After a violent melee leaves two young men brutally gunned down, Mobile detectives track down multiple suspects to piece together what happened; without an eyewitness, the prosecution must rely on the defendants themselves to reveal the truth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: When a vulnerable woman is shot to death, witnesses are hesitant to help Tulsa detectives clinch the case; at trial, the defense questions their reliability and claims the prosecution has accused the wrong man.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: After a beloved Mobile man is gunned down in his front yard, conflicting eyewitness accounts leave detectives wondering if the suspect acted in self-defense; the prosecution needs the community the victim stood up for to come forward at trial.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Mobile, Ala., a 68-year-old woman goes missing after checking into a casino where she had lost millions.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, Okla., Detective White needs a former student to tell the truth about a shooting at an apartment complex; in Gwinnett, Ga., a man is shot in front of his friend as a robbery takes a deadly turn.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Georgia's Gwinnett County, a teenager is gunned down outside a nightclub when he winds up at the center of a gang feud.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old boy is murdered after getting in over his head, detectives hope a Snapchat message can lead them to his killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, when a deadly ambush leaves two teens dead and two others critically injured, Det. Jason White follows leads from Tulsa to Mexico in his pursuit for justice.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Tulsa Detective Vernon McNeal confronts a group of childhood friends to find a killer who blindly shot into a bedroom window.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a young father is gunned down at a hotel in Gwinnett County, detectives must sort through rumors and hours of surveillance video to track down his killers.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: A registered sex offender's meet with a 13-year-old triggers a dramatic takedown at a busy gas station. Then, Tony's team exposes a grade school janitor's devious plan. Detectives join forces to snare a pastor with unholy fantasies.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a Houston cop seeks access to a mom's two kids, detectives go all in to stop one of their own; detectives team up to catch a predator with his pants down; two brave victims help Det. Godwin to expose a stepdad's horrific secret.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a teacher's deviant messages to a minor surface, Detective Godwin pushes to uncover the extent of his crimes; a predator's warped idea of love triggers a dramatic takedown; detectives snare a predator who wants both boys and girls.

programme.desc: When a young father is gunned down at a hotel in Gwinnett County, detectives must sort through rumors and hours of surveillance video to track down his killers.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A ruthless killer taunts the families of his victims; a judge tosses a lawyer in jail; an alleged rapist tries every trick in the book to escape a life sentence.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A grieving father attacks his three-year-old son's killer in court; a judge screams expletives at a disruptive member of the gallery; a wheelchair-ridden defendant runs for it before entering court.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments; a judge takes down a violent offender with his own hands; a renegade zookeeper confronts his former employees in court; a lawyer's outrageous behavior leaves her colleagues and her client shocked.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his wife defends himself in court; fists fly in a Massachusetts court room; a so-called sovereign citizen comes face to face with a taser.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A shocking road rage incident captured on video leads to an even stranger court appearance; a convicted murderer admits to killing his own cellmate; a judge charges an alleged domestic violence victim with contempt of court.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A son and daughter denounce their murderous father; a drunken driver breaks down in court; a misbehaving spectator feels the judge's wrath.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A daring escape goes horribly wrong; an armed judge is caught on camera; a man in prison for a crime he didn't commit seeks justice.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: The girlfriend of a convict sneaks a gift of methamphetamine into court; a public defender loses his virtual cool during a bond hearing; a shocking carjacking spree leads to an even more shocking moment of courtroom video.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An impossible interrogation room escape; a drunken driver keeps getting off; a judge strikes fear in everyone who appears before her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A police confrontation with an armed gunman ends with deadly consequences; a no-nonsense judge makes a shocking revelation during sentencing; a convicted killer explodes in court.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A defendant makes a serious threat in court and pays the price; a teen makes a desperate attempt to escape from the courtroom; a murder is committed by a judge.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A look at some of the wild physical attacks that have occurred inside courtrooms, a defendant goes flying over the bench to get at a Judge; a courtroom brawl features multiple members of a family; a man shoves his mother, then attacks a court clerk with a chair; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man just sentenced for drug possession and assaulting a Police Officer hurls expletives at the judge as he leaves the courtroom; the judge adjourns a pre-trial hearing because she suspects that the defendant is drunk.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A victim of kidnapping and attempted murder takes the stand to face her attacker; a man accused of murder believes his victim possessed supernatural powers; an angry judge loses his cool.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: Florida Heat
programme.desc: A high-speed chase; drugs and a gun are seized.
